Demonstrates posting form data and processing JSON responses using JavaScript with Flask.

# Purpose
The document provides instructions for setting up, running, and testing a JavaScript Ajax example application. It demonstrates how to post form data and process a JSON response using JavaScript, specifically with `fetch`, `XMLHttpRequest`, and `jQuery.ajax`. The setup section guides the user to create a Python virtual environment and install the necessary dependencies. The run section explains how to start the application using Flask and access it via a web browser. The test section provides commands to install testing dependencies and execute tests with coverage reporting using `pytest` and `coverage`.
